mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, patient_name, physician_id, physician_name, medical_technology_id, medical_technology_name, description, quantity, status, execute_time, result, remarks, operator_id, operator_name, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM disposal_request WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM disposal_request WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM disposal_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM disposal_request WHERE status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE disposal_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE disposal_request SET result = #{result}, status = 3 WHERE id = #{id}
